reviews.comment:

I think it's very misguided that the ACA has the "full" closed at night.

reviews.comment:
Para pasar y almorzar algo está bastante bien. Tiene muchas opciones para ser un YPF, hay aire acondicionado y los baños están bastante limpios.

(Translated by Google)
It's a pretty good place to stop and grab lunch. It has a lot of options for a YPF station, there's air conditioning, and the restrooms are quite clean.

reviews.comment:
Estación nueva de YPF ACA. Tiene el negocio FULL donde podes tomar ricos cafés y/o comer hamburguesas entre las opciones mas conocidas. Tambien cuenta con baños los cuales están limpios. Hay un amplio estacionamiento a disposición. Totalmente recomendada!

(Translated by Google)
New YPF ACA station. It has a full convenience store where you can enjoy delicious coffees and/or hamburgers, among other popular options. It also has clean restrooms. Ample parking is available. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtci1XNjN3RRAB
